popularStory.headline: Ephraim and Mary Cross Herrick-Beverly Puritan Colonizers
popularStory.description:
Beverly Village
     Ephraim was the 3rd known child of Henry and Editha Herrick, born 11 February 1638, in Salem. He was raised on his father’s farm across the bay in the village of Nantusket, learni …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Crosse於1640年6月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其時，她的父親Robert Cross I27歲，母親Anna Jordan23歲。她於1661年7月3日與Ephraim Herrick Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1700年9月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利享年60歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可貝弗利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Crosse于1640年6月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲Robert Cross I27岁，母亲Anna Jordan23岁。她于1661年7月3日与Ephraim Herrick Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1700年9月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利享年60岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可貝弗利。

nameMeanings.name: Crosse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cross  .

variants.name: Cross
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross, such as one set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, from Middle English cros (Old English cros and Old Norse kross, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem). It is commonly Latinized in medieval records as ad crucem and de Cruce but examples of this can just as well belong to the synonymous but less common name Crouch . In a few cases the surname may have been given originally to someone who lived by a crossroads, but this sense of the word seems to have been a comparatively late development. In other cases, the surname (and its European cognates; see 3 below) may have denoted someone who carried the cross in processions of the Christian Church, but in English at least the usual word for this sense was Crozier .
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cross’ or ‘the cross’, such as French Lacroix , German Kreutz , and Slovenian and Croatian Križ (see Kriz ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Crosse was born on 14 June 1640, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Robert Cross I, was 27 and her mother, Anna Jordan, was 23. She married Ephraim Herrick Sr on 3 July 1661, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 September 1700, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Crosse est née le 14 juin 1640, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Cross I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anna Jordan, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Ephraim Herrick Sr le 3 juillet 1661, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1700, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Crosse am 14. Juni 1640 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Cross I 27 und ihre Mutter Anna Jordan 23. Sie hat am 3. Juli 1661 in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Ephraim Herrick Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. September 1700 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Crosse è nata il il 14 giugno 1640 nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Robert Cross I, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Anna Jordan, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Ephraim Herrick Sr il 3 luglio 1661, nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1700, nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Crosseが1640年6月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Robert Cross Iは27歳，母Anna Jordanは23歳であった。1661年7月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーでEphraim Herrick Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1700年9月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーで60歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスベバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Crosse(이)가 1640년 6월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Cross I(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Jordan(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1661년 7월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 Ephraim Herrick Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1700년 9월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 비버리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Crosse nasceu em 14 de junho de 1640, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Cross I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anna Jordan, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Ephraim Herrick Sr em 3 de julho de 1661, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1700, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Crosse родилась 14 июня 1640 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Robert Cross I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Jordan, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ephraim Herrick Sr 3 июля 1661 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 сентября 1700 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности бивирли, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Crosse nació el 14 de junio de 1640, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Cross I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Anna Jordan, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ephraim Herrick Sr el 3 de julio de 1661, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1700, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Beverly, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
